FarmWork
HomeAboutSolutionsJoin Waitlist

Solutions for Every Stakeholder

From small and marginal farmers to labour agents and input retailers, FarmWork generates mutual value across the chain.

Farmers

On-time labour, cost visibility, markets.

  • • Affordable mechanization access without needing to purchase expensive machinery.
  • • Reliable workforce sourcing precisely during crucial sowing, spraying, and harvesting windows.
  • • Build a credible transaction history and output market linkages for better pricing.

Consistent work, credit & insurance.

  • • Visibility into stable, geographically clustered work opportunities.
  • • Formal digital records of payouts enabling proof-of-work identity.
  • • Direct pathway to formal financial services including credit and farm worker insurance.

Workers

Agents &
Retailers

Pipeline visibility & digitised ledgers.

  • • Labour Agents: Unified dashboard for managing pipeline, worker payments, and automatic payroll.
  • • Mechanization Partners: Maximize asset utilization by servicing localized clusters easily.
  • • Input Retailers: Track sales, maintain purchase histories, and digitize traditional ledgers efficiently.

Our Strategic Moat

FarmWork is deeply embedded in daily farm operations. Because we collect proprietary worker and farm data across geographical clusters, our platform generates powerful network effects and high switching costs, locking down immense value for all participants.

FarmWork

The operating system for India's agricultural work economy. Smart Rural Agri-Work Management.

Platform
